system.damage: boney crest d8+2 (close, forceful), talon & teeth d8+2 (hand, messy, 1 piercing)
system.moves:
- Burst out of the brush
- Bash prey to the ground, senseless
- Surround downed prey, and rend

Bigger than a grown man, with a talon yea-long on each foot and that ridge on their heads they use to go crashing through the undergrowth. They might follow a party for days, waiting for them to let their guard down or for someone to fall behind. Then? Bam. Their feathers are much-sought by merchants. You can harvest a  bundle of drake feathers (fragile, Value 3) from a flock of 3-4 drakes.
